headline: Olive Garden Slims Down Dishes to Drive Sales
summary: The home of unlimited breadsticks and big doggie bags is lightening up. Olive Garden owner Darden Restaurants said a new “Lighter Portions” menu at the Italian chain is driving visits. The new menu, which includes options of $15 and less, aims to attract both budget-conscious diners and those taking GLP-1 medications who want smaller amounts of food.
